instruction: The receipt refund icon has a yellow price tag it shouldn't. Get rid of it.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/receipt-refund.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M8.25 9.75h4.875a2.625 2.625 0 0 1 0 5.25H12M8.25 9.75 10.5 7.5M8.25 9.75 10.5 12m9-7.243V21.75l-3.75-1.5-3.75 1.5-3.75-1.5-3.75 1.5V4.757c0-1.108.806-2.057 1.907-2.185a48.507 48.507 0 0 1 11.186 0c1.1.128 1.907 1.077 1.907 2.185Z"/></g>
  <rect id="price-tag" fill="#fde047" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="84" y="96" width="28" height="14" />
  <rect id="price-tag" fill="#fde047" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="84" y="96" width="28" height="14" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/receipt-refund.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M8.25 9.75h4.875a2.625 2.625 0 0 1 0 5.25H12M8.25 9.75 10.5 7.5M8.25 9.75 10.5 12m9-7.243V21.75l-3.75-1.5-3.75 1.5-3.75-1.5-3.75 1.5V4.757c0-1.108.806-2.057 1.907-2.185a48.507 48.507 0 0 1 11.186 0c1.1.128 1.907 1.077 1.907 2.185Z"/></g>
</svg>
